title: Roger's Cozy Adventures
description: Embark on an epic journey through enhanced dungeons, brutal combat, and mysterious realms. This modpack blends exploration, performance, and immersive progression with a custom quest system to guide your adventure.
body:
# ⚔️Roger's Cozy Adventures – Reforged🍄

### About This ModPack

The Cozy Adventures ModPack has received a **massive update**! Everything has been rebuilt from scratch — all previous mods were removed, and the entire pack was **redesigned** to deliver a richer, smoother experience. Now featuring over **200 mods**, it focuses on combat, adventure, and exploration, while still including plenty of quality-of-life features and beautiful decorations for players who prefer a cozy home life.

Expect **new bosses**, **diverse weapons** and **armor sets**, and tons of new content to discover across a **completely refreshed world**. Performance has also been significantly improved, so the adventure runs smoother than ever.

**Note**: Quests are not yet available but will be added soon!

## ⭐Features

⚔️ Over 200 mods focused on combat, adventure, and exploration.

🏰 Countless new structures, dungeons, and biomes to explore.

👑 New bosses, weapons, and armor sets.

🎨 Tons of decorative blocks and furniture for builders.

⚙️ Improved performance and stability.

🎒 Quality of life improvements for an enhanced gameplay experience.

🚧 Quests coming soon!
 

**🐛 How to Report Issues**

Experiencing bugs, crashes, or other issues? Firstly, I'm terrebly sorry, secondly you can report them [here]

**❤️Support**

Feel free to support me if you'd like or if you like my work.
